meta.title: Security | Pulse Appointments
meta.description: How Pulse Appointments protects your business data and your clients' information. Encryption, access controls, PIPEDA compliance, and responsible disclosure.

hero.title: Security
hero.intro: Protecting your business data and your clients' information is foundational to everything Pulse does. Here is how we keep your data safe.

encryption.title: Encryption in transit and at rest
encryption.body: All data transmitted to and from Pulse is encrypted using TLS 1.3. Data stored in our database is encrypted at rest using AES-256. Backups are also encrypted.

passwords.title: Password security
passwords.body: Passwords are hashed with bcrypt (cost factor 12) before storage. Pulse never stores plaintext passwords. Password reset tokens are single-use and expire in 15 minutes.

twofa.title: Two-factor authentication
twofa.body: All user accounts can enable two-factor authentication (2FA) via email or SMS. Business owners are encouraged to enable 2FA on initial setup. Recovery codes are provided at enrollment.

audit.title: Audit logging
audit.body: Security-relevant actions — logins, password changes, staff changes, permission updates, and data exports — are written to a tamper-evident audit log accessible to business owners.

loginAlerts.title: Login alerts
loginAlerts.body: When a sign-in occurs from a new device or IP address, we send an immediate security alert email. The alert includes a one-click password reset link so you can lock your account if it wasn't you.

infra.title: Infrastructure
infra.body: Pulse runs on Railway, a SOC 2 Type II certified cloud platform. Our database is hosted on a managed PostgreSQL service with automated backups, point-in-time recovery, and network isolation.

pci.title: PCI compliance via Stripe
pci.body: Pulse does not store credit card numbers, CVVs, or full payment details. All card processing is handled by Stripe, a PCI DSS Level 1 certified payment processor. Pulse receives only tokenized references.

pipeda.title: Canadian privacy (PIPEDA)
pipeda.body: Pulse is designed for Canadian businesses and built around PIPEDA Schedule 1 obligations — including purpose limitation, data minimization, safeguards, and breach notification. See our Canadian Privacy page for details.

breach.title: Breach notification
breach.body: In the event of a confirmed data breach affecting your business, Pulse will notify affected businesses and clients in accordance with PIPEDA's mandatory breach reporting requirements (within 72 hours of determination).

disclosure.title: Responsible disclosure
disclosure.body: Security researchers who discover a vulnerability in Pulse are encouraged to report it responsibly. We commit to acknowledging reports within 2 business days and to not pursuing legal action against good-faith disclosures.

contact.title: Questions about our security practices?
contact.body: We are happy to answer questions from business owners, enterprise buyers, or privacy officers.

meta.title: Appointment Booking Software Pricing | Pulse Appointments
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing for Canadian service businesses. Start free — no credit card required. Upgrade when you're ready.

og.title: Appointment Booking Software Pricing | Pulse Appointments
og.description: Start free, upgrade when you need SMS reminders, deposits, and no-show protection.

hero.title: Simple, transparent pricing
hero.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade only when you need deposits, SMS reminders, or no-show protection. No contracts. Cancel anytime.

FREE.name: Free
FREE.desc: Everything you need to start taking bookings online.

BASIC.name: Basic
BASIC.desc: Accept payments, deposits, and client texts.

PRO.name: Pro
PRO.desc: Automated reminders, no-show protection, and team tools.

UNLIMITED.name: Unlimited
UNLIMITED.desc: All Pro features across up to 5 locations.

table.footnote: * 1/mo — one automatic fee per calendar month on Free and Basic plans. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited no-show and late-cancel fees.

faq.a: The Free plan has no time limit. Use it forever, then upgrade when you're ready.
Yes. Downgrade or cancel from your account settings at any time. No cancellation fees.

faq.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a: All major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, and Google Pay via Stripe. Payments are in CAD.

ctaSection.title: Ready to get started?
ctaSection.subtitle: Create your free account in under 2 minutes. No credit card required.

og.title: Online Booking Software for Canadian Service Businesses | Pulse Appointments
og.description: Pulse is the simplest online booking software for Canadian salons, spas, and service businesses. Free to start.

hero.headlinePre: The simplest online booking software for
hero.subtitle: Start free with unlimited online bookings, client management, confirmations, and a public booking page. Upgrade when you need reminders, deposits, or SMS.

steps.label: Reminder queued
steps.detail: Email and SMS on paid plans

tour.title: See the booking flow before you commit
tour.body: Pulse is built around the work that actually affects revenue: clients book online, pay deposits when needed, get reminders automatically, and leave real reviews after completed appointments.

items.title: Client picks a service
items.desc: Your public booking page shows services, staff, locations, and available times.

items.title: Deposit or card hold protects the slot
items.desc: Paid plans can collect deposits and save cards for no-show protection.

items.title: Completed visits become review requests
items.desc: Pulse sends signed review links so published feedback comes from real appointments.

mockup.depositNote: Confirmation, reminder, and review request are queued automatically.

howItWorks.title: Up and running in minutes
howItWorks.subtitle: No training required. No complicated setup. Just your services, your link, and your clients.

steps.title: Add your services
steps.desc: Set up your services, pricing, and availability in under 5 minutes.

steps.title: Share your link
steps.desc: Put your booking link in your Instagram bio, Google profile, or website.

steps.title: Get booked
steps.desc: Clients book themselves around the clock. You just show up and do the work.

features.title: Everything your schedule needs
features.subtitle: Built for small businesses, solo professionals, and growing teams — from pet groomers to beauty, wellness, and every appointment-based service in between.

items.title: 24/7 Online Booking
items.desc: No more phone tag. Clients book, reschedule, and cancel on their own time.

items.title: Automated Reminders
items.desc: Paid plans add scheduled email and SMS reminders. Every plan includes booking confirmations and updates.

items.title: Deposits & No-Show Protection
items.desc: Collect deposits at booking on Basic+. Pro and Unlimited add automatic no-show and late-cancel fees charged to saved cards.

items.title: Intake & Consent Forms
items.desc: Collect health notes, allergies, or custom client questions right in the booking flow — no extra app needed.

items.title: Accept Apple Pay & Google Pay
items.desc: Clients pay at checkout with the tap of a finger. Powered by Stripe with CAD support, no extra setup required.

items.title: Multi-Provider & Multi-Location
items.desc: Add your whole team, each with their own calendar and services. Pro supports 2 locations; Unlimited supports up to 5.
